summary: Meaningful Engagement Tracking - All 38 backend tests PASSED (100%). The 4 new meaningful engagement fields (last_meaningful_engagement_at, last_meaningful_engagement_type, days_since_last_meaningful_engagement, engagement_freshness_label) are fully functional in the program_metrics API.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/internal/programs/{program_id}/metrics returns 4 new fields: last_meaningful_engagement_at, last_meaningful_engagement_type, days_since_last_meaningful_engagement, engagement_freshness_label
VERIFIED: engagement_freshness_label is one of: active_recently, needs_follow_up, momentum_slowing, no_recent_engagement
VERIFIED: UF program (has meaningful interactions): last_meaningful_engagement_at is NOT null, label is active_recently, meaningful_interaction_count > 0
VERIFIED: Stanford program (no meaningful interactions): last_meaningful_engagement_at is null, label is no_recent_engagement, meaningful_interaction_count = 0
VERIFIED: days_since_last_meaningful_engagement is separate from days_since_last_engagement (meaningful is subset of all)
VERIFIED: meaningful_interaction_count uses refined ruleset (_is_meaningful_engagement function)
VERIFIED: POST recompute-metrics returns the 4 new fields correctly
VERIFIED: POST recompute-all still works with 0 errors (admin-only)
VERIFIED: 403 for non-athlete on GET/POST single-program endpoints still works
VERIFIED: All existing fields (reply_rate, stage_velocity, engagement_trend, etc.) are unchanged and still present

CODE REVIEW: _is_meaningful_engagement() function correctly implements the ruleset: type-based (coach_reply, calls, visits, camps), signal-based (coach_question_detected, request_type, invite_type, offer_signal, scholarship_signal), is_meaningful flag, and 48h athlete reply rule

success_rate.backend: 100% (38/38 tests passed - 22 original + 16 new meaningful engagement tests)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing Emma Chen data with UF (meaningful) and Stanford (no meaningful) programs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Meaningful engagement tracking fully tested. 4 new fields added to program_metrics: last_meaningful_engagement_at, last_meaningful_engagement_type, days_since_last_meaningful_engagement, engagement_freshness_label. UF program has meaningful interactions (active_recently), Stanford has none (no_recent_engagement). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_meaningful_engagement.py. Meaningful engagement rules: coach replies, calls, visits, camps, signal fields (coach_question_detected, request_type, invite_type, offer_signal, scholarship_signal), is_meaningful flag, and 48h athlete reply rule.
